top_findings.summary: The skill description requests access to Claude history and project data (`~/.claude/history.jsonl` and `~/.claude/projects/*/*.jsonl`), which is unrelated to the stated primary purpose of extracting hidden Amp API patterns from local Amp thread data. This is excessive and not justified by the skill's core function of analyzing Amp-specific JSON files.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill description requests access to Claude history and project data (`~/.claude/history.jsonl` and `~/.claude/projects/*/*.jsonl`), which is unrelated to the stated primary purpose of extracting hidden Amp API patterns from local Amp thread data. This is excessive and not justified by the skill's core function of analyzing Amp-specific JSON files.
